news.t: Red-Hot Chip Stocks Are Lifting Tech ETFs. One ETF Has Doubled Since It Launched Last Month.
SMH, SOXX, FTXL, SOXL ETFs crash as chip stocks dive
Not all semiconductor ETFs are the same. What investors need to know before betting on Nvidia and other chip stocks.
These sector ETFs could make big moves if Trump is seen winning the White House
Michael Barry shorts SOXX: Are the SMH, FTXL, XSD, ETFs at risk?
Chipmaker ETFs jump on Qualcomm's best day in 14 weeks
Semiconductor ETFs sell off as Huawei crackdown intensifies
Chipmakers have surged this year, but first-quarter earnings reports might really disappoint

holdings.infoBox: FTXL is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Intel stock at 12.52%, Micron Technology at 10.91%, Marvell Technology at 7.85%, QUALCOMM at 6.82%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 5.86%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Semiconductor ETF (FTXL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq US Smart Semiconductor index. The fund tracks an index of the most liquid US semiconductor companies, weighted according to factors related to value, volatility and growth. FTXL was launched on Sep 20, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Red-Hot Chip Stocks Are Lifting Tech ETFs. One ETF Has Doubled Since It Launched Last Month.
data.text: Some exchange-traded funds offer the safety of diversification at the expense of eye-popping returns. This year, returns are the story, especially at funds that hold big slugs of red-hot chip shares.

data.text: Semiconductor ETFs slumped Friday as the Trump administration stepped up its fight with China's Huawei Technologies.

data.title: Chip stocks get wrecked on Nvidia warnings
data.text: Dave Nadig, ETF.com managing director and Kevin O'Leary, O'Shares ETFs chairman, join CNBC's Bob Pisani to discuss how to trade the semiconductor sector after Nvidia reported it's lowering guidance.
